query:
SELECT 
  u.name as corretor,
  i.tipo,
  COUNT(*) as total_interacoes,
  DATE(i.createdAt) as data
FROM interacoes i
JOIN users u ON i.corretorId = u.id
WHERE u.name = 'Andrew'
  AND DATE(i.createdAt) = CURDATE()
GROUP BY u.name, i.tipo, DATE(i.createdAt);
